alternative_parents.description: Organonitrogen compounds with the general formula RN(H)N(H)C(=O)N (R = organyl).
alternative_parents.name: Hydrazinecarboxamides

alternative_parents.description: Carboxylic acid derivatives containing a carbonyl group in which the carbon is directly linked to a hydrazide group (N-N).
alternative_parents.name: Carboxylic acid hydrazides

alternative_parents.description: Compounds comprising the primary alcohol functional group, with the general structure RCOH (R=alkyl, aryl).
alternative_parents.name: Primary alcohols

alternative_parents.description: Organic compounds containing an oxide group.
alternative_parents.name: Organic oxides

alternative_parents.description: Derivatives of hydrocarbons obtained by substituting one or more carbon atoms by an heteroatom. They contain at least one carbon atom and heteroatom.
alternative_parents.name: Hydrocarbon derivatives

alternative_parents.description: Organic compounds containing a carbonyl group, with the general structure RC(=O)R', where R=organyl, R'=H, N, O, organyl group or halide group.
alternative_parents.name: Carbonyl compounds

class.description: Organic compounds containing a nitrogen atom.
class.name: Organonitrogen compounds

description: This compound belongs to the class of organic compounds known as semicarbazides. These are organic compounds containing the semicarbazide functional group with the general structure R1(N)R2NR3C(=O)N(R4)R5 (R1-R5=H, alkyl, aryl), a derivative of urea, where the amine group on one side has been replace by a hydrazine group.

direct_parent.description: Organic compounds containing the semicarbazide functional group with the general structure R1(N)R2NR3C(=O)N(R4)R5 (R1-R5=H, alkyl, aryl), a derivative of urea, where the amine group on one side has been replace by a hydrazine group.
direct_parent.name: Semicarbazides

kingdom.description: Compounds that contain at least one carbon atom, excluding isocyanide/cyanide and their non-hydrocarbyl derivatives, thiophosgene, carbon diselenide, carbon monosulfide, carbon disulfide, carbon subsulfide, carbon monoxide, carbon dioxide, Carbon suboxide, and dicarbon monoxide.
kingdom.name: Organic compounds

subclass.description: Compounds comprising the hydrazine functional group, with the general formula R1R2NNR3R4.
subclass.name: Hydrazines and derivatives

superclass.description: Organic compounds containing a nitrogen atom.
superclass.name: Organic nitrogen compounds
